name: Something in My Room
original_name: ผมกับผีในห้อง
overview: Phat just moved into a new rental house with his mother, Chris. There, he meets Phob, an amnesiac ghost, and Phat has to help Phob solve the mystery of his death within forty-nine days of his death.

trailers.title: ผมกับผีในห้อง SOMETHING IN MY ROOM 1st Official Trailer
